description_long: This is a standard traffic cone, predominantly orange with two wide, horizontal gray reflective stripes encircling its conical body. The cone is made of flexible plastic, tapering smoothly from a broad, square base to a rounded, solid tip. The base is flat, wide, and slightly beveled at the edges, providing stability and resistance to tipping. The surface of the cone is smooth with a matte finish, and the reflective stripes are integrated seamlessly into the body. There are no visible logos, text, or additional markings on the exterior. The overall condition appears new, with no signs of wear, dirt, or damage.
description: A bright orange traffic cone with two gray reflective stripes, a wide square base, and a smooth, matte surface. The cone appears new and undamaged.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full height of the orange cone, both gray reflective stripes, and the wide, square base.
description_view_1: Side view with the same features visible, highlighting the smooth taper and the even width of the reflective stripes.
description_view_2: Another rotated view, similar to the front, with both reflective stripes and the base clearly visible.
description_view_3: View from a different angle, again showing the orange body, gray stripes, and the stable base.
attribute_reflective_stripes: Two wide, horizontal gray reflective stripes encircle the cone, evenly spaced along the upper half.
attribute_tip_design: The tip is rounded, solid, and orange, with no attachments or distinctive features.
attribute_base_design: The base is square, wide, and flat with slightly beveled edges, made of the same orange plastic, providing stability and resistance to tipping.
attribute_presence_of_logos_or_markings: No logos, text, or other markings are visible on the object.
